title: Existing Data Standardization Execution
done_criteria: All child tasks have evidence and existing rows are standardized or routed for governed follow-up
validation_notes: Existing rows must be brought into approved standards not only described

title: Inventory standardization targets
done_criteria: Live target tables fields rows and current nonstandard values are inventoried
validation_notes: No write work before live target inventory

title: Map current values to canonical standards
done_criteria: Each target has a canonical destination exemption or review route
validation_notes: Use WBS04 WBS05 and WBS06 outputs

title: Generate dry run standardization plan
done_criteria: Dry run lists proposed row creations row updates replacement rows legacy markers checks and zero unclassified actions
validation_notes: No data write before dry run evidence

title: Create missing canonical destinations
done_criteria: Approved missing options or destination fields exist and schema readback proves them

title: Apply safe in place value normalization
done_criteria: Safe direct value updates are applied and verified by readback

title: Create corrected replacement records
done_criteria: Replacement records preserve unique data and source traceability
validation_notes: Use corrected-copy pattern when safer than direct mutation

title: Verify replacements and dependency migration
done_criteria: Replacement rows and dependencies are verified before old rows are superseded

title: Stage superseded rows for governed follow up
done_criteria: Superseded rows are staged only after replacement and dependency readback

title: Mark legacy fields for later schema review
done_criteria: Approved legacy fields are clearly marked after data migration and schema readback
validation_notes: Marking is not final schema removal

title: Post standardization verification and closeout
done_criteria: Verification shows data meets standards and all leftovers are routed or exempted
